bird.name: Stolid flycatcher
bird.summary: The stolid flycatcher (Myiarchus stolidus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found on the Caribb…

relations.subject: Stolid flycatcher
relations.evidence: | page =406 }} It inhabits the interior and edges of lowland forest, drier woodlands, scrublands, and mangroves
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Stolid flycatcher
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered common on both islands. "Habitat loss [is] continuing throughout this species' range; problems include hurricane damage, widespread pesticide use, plantations of exotic trees, timber removal, deliberate fires, and continuing conversion for small-scale farming and urbanization."
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
